case_title: ERIN CIVELLO VS. THISTLE LLC,A CALIFORNIA LLC DBA DINE RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CIVELLO, ERIN AS TO DEFENDANT THISTLE LLC,A CALIFORNIA LLC DBA DINE RESTAURANT MCCLASKEY, JULIA INDIVIDUALLY HILL, ROBERT INDIVIDUALLY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CIVELLO, ERIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THISTLE LLC,A CALIFORNIA LLC DBA DINE RESTAURANT MCCLASKEY, JULIA INDIVIDUALLY HILL, ROBERT INDIVIDUALLY $3,795.85 PRINCIPAL, $12.87 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,962.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
